name: LeanFlow: A Case Study in Workflow-Driven Lean Autoformalization
summary: arXiv:2607.20503v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present and evaluate LeanFlow, an LLM agent system specialized for translating mathematical papers into buildable Lean projects. Recent verifier-i...
description: arXiv:2607.20503v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present and evaluate LeanFlow, an LLM agent system specialized for translating mathematical papers into buildable Lean projects. Recent verifier-in-the-loop systems show that large formal artifacts can be produced, but it remains unclear which runtime mechanisms affect completion, auditability, or efficiency in document-to-project formalization...
author: Lazar Milikic, Simon Guilloud, Khanh Nguyen, Viktor Kuncak
